video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: appearing on counter, visually consistent. 灯光闪烁后熄灭又亮起, 镜子外多了一只红杯, 镜子里的人影消失. Narration: "灯光熄灭又亮起，镜子外多了一只红杯，镜子里少了一个人。". Protagonist A says: "你出来了？". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. Medium shot of kitchen counter with a red mug appearing, mirror in background showing empty reflection, flickering light, suspenseful atmosphere. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
video_prompt_keywords: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, red fridge, wooden table, rainy window, dim warm lamp + blue moonlight, charA_v1, short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand, mug_red_v1, 灯光闪烁后熄灭又亮起, 镜子外多了一只红杯, 镜子里的人影消失, Protagonist A says: "你出来了？", Medium shot of kitchen counter with a red mug appearing, mirror in background showing empty reflection, flickering light, suspenseful atmosphere
video_prompt_short: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: appearing on counter, visually consistent. 灯光闪烁后熄灭又亮起, 镜子外多了一只红杯, 镜子里的人影消失. Narration: "灯光熄灭又亮起，镜子外多了一只红杯，镜子里少了一个人。"....
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, static, flat lighting, no mirror, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action

action_beats: 灯光闪烁后熄灭又亮起

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 灯光熄灭又亮起，镜子外多了一只红杯，镜子里少了一个人。

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S037/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
